name: nplan-core
description: Safety-gated planning and governed NPlan project memory for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Safety-gated plans and governed project memory.
interface.longDescription: Create bounded plans with untrusted-input isolation, harmful-task gating, independent validation states, and governed memory proposals requiring exact decisions.
interface.defaultPrompt: Safety-check this request, create a bounded NPlan plan, and report independent validation status without executing it.
